label: Order
description: Preference for structure, rules, consistency, and disciplined systems.

label: Chaos
description: Preference for spontaneity, disruption, unpredictability, and raw impulse.

label: Duty
description: Desire to serve a cause, oath, people, or shared responsibility.

label: Freedom
description: Desire for independence, self-direction, and resistance to external control.

label: Logic
description: Preference for reason, analysis, study, and deliberate decision-making.

label: Instinct
description: Preference for intuition, emotion, reflex, and gut-driven action.

label: Mercy
description: Preference for compassion, restraint, and giving others a second chance.

label: Ruthlessness
description: Willingness to do harm, impose fear, or remove obstacles without hesitation.

label: Honor
description: Respect for integrity, word-keeping, fair conduct, and principled action.

label: Pragmatism
description: Preference for effective outcomes over ideals, tradition, or purity.

label: Leadership
description: Inclination to guide, command, inspire, or organize others.

label: Solitude
description: Comfort with self-reliance, privacy, and operating alone.

label: Spotlight
description: Comfort with visibility, presence, charisma, and theatricality.

label: Subtlety
description: Preference for low-profile influence, stealth, nuance, and concealment.

label: Outsider
description: Affinity for alienation, being different, monstrous, exiled, or beyond the norm.

label: Nobility
description: Affinity for refinement, legacy, prestige, elevated purpose, or regal identity.

label: Martial Affinity
description: Affinity for physical prowess, weapons, tactics, and direct combat.

label: Arcane Affinity
description: Affinity for learned or innate magical power, spellcasting, and reality-shaping.

label: Divine Affinity
description: Affinity for sacred purpose, blessing, judgment, faith, or celestial power.

label: Primal Affinity
description: Affinity for wilderness, beasts, natural forces, transformation, and instinctive power.

label: Shadow Affinity
description: Affinity for forbidden, eldritch, sinister, cursed, or fear-based power.

label: Trickster Affinity
description: Affinity for deception, misdirection, mischief, improvisation, and clever manipulation.

label: Frontline
description: Preference for being near danger, engaging directly, and holding space.

label: Backline
description: Preference for distance, planning, ranged influence, or indirect pressure.

label: Control
description: Preference for battlefield shaping, planning, denial, restraint, and tactical influence.

label: Destruction
description: Preference for burst, lethal power, overwhelming force, and direct removal of threats.

label: Support
description: Preference for empowering allies, protecting others, healing, and team enablement.

label: Mobility
description: Preference for movement, repositioning, skirmishing, and evasive play.

label: Resilience
description: Preference for durability, staying power, tanking, and surviving pressure.

label: Complexity
description: Comfort with layered mechanics, resource planning, combos, and high-cognitive-load play.
